sys_properties.description:
Quarantine Package Name for Windows machines

Set this to the name of the package to be used to quarantine Windows endpoints using Tanium.
As per the Tanium documentation, in order for this to work, you must have configured the "taniumquarantine.dat" file that's associated with each quarantine package (for Windows, Linux, and Mac) in your Tanium environment.

!IMPORTANT!
The default value for this property is the out-of-box Tanium quarantine package for Windows endpoints.
If you've created a custom action package by copying the out-of-box package (which is recommended!), then you'll need to set this property to the name of that custom package.
Quarantining endpoints requires the Tanium Threat Response module.

Default: Apply Windows IPsec Quarantine
sys_properties.name: x_taniu_tan_core.windows_quarantine_package_name
